# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-service
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-authz
  namespace: my-microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: my-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - "my-client.my-microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
  rules:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/inject: enabled
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST"]
            paths: ["/api/*"]
